sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْجَمِيعِ حِمَايَةُ مَعْلُومَاتِهِمُ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Svi moraju štititi svoje lične podatke na internetu.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone must protect their personal information online.

sentences.arabic: لَا تُشَارِكْ كَلِمَةَ السِّرِّ الْخَاصَّةَ بِكَ مَعَ الْغُرَبَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ne dijeli svoju lozinku sa strancima.
sentences.translationEn: Do not share your password with strangers.

sentences.arabic: الْخُصُوصِيَّةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ مَوْضُوعٌ مُهِمٌّ جِدًّا فِي عَصْرِنَا الْحَالِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna privatnost je veoma važna tema u našem sadašnjem vremenu.
sentences.translationEn: Digital privacy is a very important topic in our current era.
